resultList.plgdtldesc: This semi-furnished 2 BHK apartment for sale in the highly sought-after Ordnance Apartments in Vikaspuri, New Delhi, offers an excellent opportunity for families seeking comfort and convenience in a well-connected locality. Positioned on the second floor of a well-managed three-story building, this north-facing, Vaastu-friendly home features elegant vitrified tile flooring and enjoys ample natural light and ventilation. The layout includes a spacious living-and-dining area, two bedrooms with fitted wardrobes, and two modern, western-style bathrooms equipped with geysers (one attached and one shared). Both the living area and one bedroom open up to balconies offering beautiful views of the nearby park. Culinary needs are well-catered to by a modular kitchen complete with a piped gas connection and an attached utility area. Residents will benefit from essential facilities such as open parking, a 24-hour water supply, and round-the-clock security with CCTV monitoring. Strategically located, the property is just a stone's throw away from public transport, 100 meters from hospitals and Mamta Model School, 300 meters from malls and grocery shops, and only 2 km from the metro station, ensuring maximum convenience for daily living.

resultList.plgdtldesc: This ready-to-move 2 BHK apartment in Green View Apartment, Vasundhara, Ghaziabad, is an excellent option for families seeking a furnished home in a well-established residential neighbourhood. Spread across 90 sq. m, the apartment is situated on the 3rd floor of a 3-storey building and offers a comfortable living environment with good ventilation and natural light. The property comes fully furnished, making it suitable for immediate occupancy without additional setup requirements. Its east-facing orientation further enhances brightness throughout the day, while the location provides easy access to schools, healthcare facilities, shopping centres, and daily conveniences. Property Specifications: The apartment features 2 spacious bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 2 balconies. It is located on the top floor, providing added privacy and a quieter living experience. The bathrooms are designed with a separate layout, and the flooring throughout the home is finished with durable tiles for easy maintenance. The flat is furnished and includes essential fittings and storage provisions. Additional spaces, such as a puja room, study room, and store room,m further improve functionality for modern family living. The property also comes with 1 open parking space and enjoys an east-facing orientation. Facilities Residents of Green View Apartment benefit from several lifestyle and convenience amenities,s including security services, lift access, power backup, RO water system, rainwater harvesting, clubhouse, swimming pool, and a gymnasium. A rooftop gym facility further adds to the recreational offerings within the complex. The project is designed to provide a comfortable and secure residential environment suitable for families and working professionals. Locality: Vasundharara is one of Ghaziabad's most established and sought-after residential townships, known for its planned infrastructure, connectivity, and proximity to Delhi. The apartment is located within approximately 100 metres of daily convenience stores and enjoys excellent access to schools, hospitals, shopping centres, and public transport facilities. Notable nearby landmarks include Aggarsain Chowk, Seth Anandram Jaipuria School, Mewar Institute of Management, and several healthcare centres. The locality continues to attract homebuyers due to its strong connectivity, stable property values, and well-developed civic infrastructure. Recent real estate reports also highlight Vasundhara among Ghaziabad's premium residential destinations because of its connectivity and mature neighbourhood environment.

resultList.plgdtldesc: Experience modern and upscale urban living with this premium residential apartment available for sale in Real World Residency, situated in the highly sought-after neighbourhood of Indirapuram, Ghaziabad. Offering an exceptional combination of sophisticated design and structural quality, this ready-to-move-in home is ideal for families looking for a seamless blend of luxury, convenience, and community living.Property SpecificationsThis thoughtfully planned apartment features a generous super area of 1430 sq. ft and is positioned on the 18th floor of an impressive 27-storey residential tower. The accommodation comprises three spacious and well-ventilated bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, and four large balconies that offer expansive views of the main road and surrounding areas. Being less than five years old, the property is relatively new and comes semi-furnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to customise the final interiors according to their personal taste.FacilitiesThe gated complex provides a comprehensive set of premium amenities designed to offer an active and comfortable lifestyle. Health and medical needs are well met by the Apollo Cradle and Childrens Hospital located 1.5 km away. For leisure, shopping, and dining, residents can easily visit Shipra Mall, which is 1.5 km from the project, or Aditya City Centre Mall, situated just 1.9 km away.
